reasoning_model_1: The model successfully generates the audio in English, closely following the provided text. In terms of the target feature 'Age', the model performs excellently. The tone is gentle, breathy, and warm, fitting the 'grandmotherly' archetype perfectly. The paralinguistic expression of age is vivid and natural.

While the voice texture has a slight raspiness that could suggest an older male, the energy and pace are somewhat brisk (00:00-00:13), sounding more middle-aged than distinctly elderly. model_comparison: Model 1 followed the instructions almost perfectly, delivering the correct English text (with one negligible word substitution) in a convincing elderly voice characterized by slow pacing and a gentle, breathy timbre. Model 2 failed significantly by generating speech in the wrong language (Chinese instead of English). Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
